# M3 Pastel Glass (Hybrid)

M3 Pastel Glass combines Material You tonal systems with subtle glassmorphism.

## Core Features
- Tonal pastel palette with clear primary/secondary separation
- Generous corner radius (`rounded-2xl` to `rounded-3xl`)
- Light translucency with restrained blur (`backdrop-blur-sm` to `backdrop-blur-md`)
- Thin borders (`border-white/20` or `border-slate-200/40`) for surface definition

## Component Patterns
- Cards: translucent surface + soft elevation
- Buttons: tonal fills with low-motion hover transitions
- Inputs: clean outlines, high contrast labels, clear focus states

## Interaction
- Prioritize subtle transitions (`duration-150` to `duration-200`)
- Keep motion minimal and purposeful
- Maintain visible keyboard focus for all interactive elements
